title: Wave of the Sea Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A roaring sea dragon raises a giant wave to save the day! 🌊

q.en: Why did Drake sneak into the Fortress of the Stone Dragon?
q.zh: 德雷克为什么要偷偷溜进石龙堡垒？

options.en: To steal Astrid's spell ingredients and stop her spell
options.zh: 去偷走阿斯特丽德的咒语材料，阻止她的咒语

options.en: To meet the Stone Dragon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 去见石龙（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Drake wanted to stop Astrid from casting the False Life spell, so he tried to steal the spell ingredients. He got away with the branch from the shadow bush.
explain.zh: 德雷克想阻止阿斯特丽德施放假生命咒语，于是去偷咒语材料，最终只抢到了影灌木的枝条。

q.en: What happens if you prick yourself with a shadow bush thorn?
q.zh: 如果你被影灌木的刺扎到，会发生什么？

options.en: You turn to stone according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 你会变成石头（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Jayana warned that pricking yourself with a shadow bush thorn turns you into a shadow, and you stay that way unless you prick yourself a second time within the hour.
explain.zh: 佳雅娜警告说，被影灌木的刺扎到会变成影子，除非在一小时内再扎一次，否则会永远是影子。

q.en: Why can't Astrid simply get a new shadow bush branch?
q.zh: 为什么阿斯特丽德不能简单地再取一根影灌木枝条？

options.en: They grow only in Bracken according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它们只长在布雷肯（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The branch must be taken on the night of a full moon
options.zh: 枝条必须在满月之夜才能取到

explain.en: Jayana said the branch must be taken on the night of a full moon, which was more than two weeks away, buying the Dragon Masters time.
explain.zh: 佳雅娜说枝条必须在满月之夜才能取到，而那时还有两个多星期，为驯龙师们争取了时间。

q.en: On which island do the Dragon Masters find the Sea Dragon Tani?
q.zh: 驯龙师们是在哪个岛上找到海龙塔尼的？

explain.en: Bo had found a Sea Dragon on the island of Kapua, so Griffith sent Drake, Bo, and Opeli there to bring back the branch where Astrid wouldn't look.
explain.zh: 博在卡普阿岛找到了海龙，于是格里菲斯派德雷克、博和奥佩利去那里，顺便把枝条带离阿斯特丽德能找的地方。

q.en: What is Manawa's title for his connection with Tani?
q.zh: 马纳瓦与塔尼之间的连接被称为什么身份？

explain.en: On Kapua, Manawa is chosen to connect with Tani but is called a 'Dragon Friend' rather than a Dragon Master.
explain.zh: 在卡普阿岛，马纳瓦被选中与塔尼连接，但他被称为“龙之友”而非驯龙师。

q.en: Why do Ka the Lava Dragon and Tani the Sea Dragon start to fight?
q.zh: 为什么熔岩龙卡和海龙塔尼一开始打了起来？

options.en: They wanted the same food according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 它们抢同一种食物（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）
阿斯特丽德命令它们打

options.en: Long ago Lava and Sea Dragons fought and Sea Dragons never forgave them
options.zh: 很久以前熔岩龙和海龙打过仗，海龙一直没原谅它们

explain.en: Ka remembers stories of a big ancient fight between Lava and Sea Dragons on Noa; the Sea Dragons left and never forgave the Lava Dragons, so they clash.
explain.zh: 卡记得诺阿岛上熔岩龙与海龙远古大战的故事，海龙离开后始终没有原谅熔岩龙，所以双方起了冲突。

q.en: How does Drake hide from Astrid on the beach?
q.zh: 德雷克在海滩上是如何躲开阿斯特丽德的？

options.en: He pricked his finger on a thorn and became a shadow
options.zh: 他用刺扎破手指变成了影子

options.en: He used a magic mirror according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他用了魔法镜（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Drake pressed his finger on a thorn from the branch, turning himself into a shadow so Astrid could not see him.
explain.zh: 德雷克用枝条上的刺扎破手指，把自己变成了影子，这样阿斯特丽德就看不见他了。

q.en: How does Astrid finally leave the island?
q.zh: 阿斯特丽德最终是怎样离开小岛的？

options.en: Manawa pushed her into her own portal
options.zh: 马纳瓦把她推进了她自己的传送门

options.en: She flew away on a dragon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她骑龙飞走了（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: After Astrid zapped the Dragon Masters' stones black, Manawa sprang forward and pushed her backward into the swirling portal, which then closed.
explain.zh: 阿斯特丽德把驯龙师们的石头击黑后，马纳瓦冲上前把她推回了旋转的传送门，传送门随即关闭。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters repair their blackened Dragon Stones?
q.zh: 驯龙师们是如何修复变黑了的龙石的？

options.en: With Shu the Water Dragon's blue healing mist
options.zh: 用水龙舒的蓝色治愈之雾

options.en: By washing them in the ocean
With a new Tenebrex Stone according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 用新的特内布雷克斯石（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Bo realized Shu's blue mist can heal dark magic; Shu's pale blue cloud rained on the black stones and returned them to green.
explain.zh: 博想到水龙舒的蓝雾能治愈黑魔法，舒的淡蓝雾落在黑石上，使它们恢复了绿色。

q.en: At the end of the book, what new dragon do the Dragon Masters still need?
q.zh: 在书的结尾，驯龙师们还需要哪一种新龙？

explain.en: Griffith tells Drake that Rori and Ana learned where to find a Wind Dragon — the third dragon needed for the counterspell.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯告诉德雷克，罗瑞和安娜找到了风龙的线索——这是逆转咒语所需的第三只龙。
